name: Sycamore
oneliner: Trusted agent operating system for the enterprise — enabling organisations to deploy, orchestrate, and govern autonomous AI agents with built-in security, compliance, and operational control.
finserv: Enterprise customers confirmed but not named. No explicit finserv evidence.
team: Sri Viswanath (CEO, former Atlassian CTO, scaled eng to 7,000+; former Coatue investor). Angels: Bob McGrew (ex-OpenAI Chief Scientist), Ali Ghodsi (Databricks CEO), Lip-Bu Tan (Intel CEO). Led by Coatue + Lightspeed.
thesis: Sycamore's 'trusted agent OS' framing is the closest the orchestration category has come to addressing governance and compliance natively. If 'trusted' gets operationalised into regulatory compliance primitives, this becomes thesis-relevant infrastructure at the OS level.
evidence: Former Coatue partner raises $65M seed for enterprise AI agent startup
Sycamore Raises $65M to Build the Trusted Agent Operating System
